Items.Title: Ionic 聊天应用程序：只需 3 个简单步骤即可进行群组和一对一聊天。 | Ionic Chat App: Group and 1-1 Chat in 3 easy steps.
Items.Description:
本文最初发表于 DeadSimpleChat 博客： Ionic Chat App：通过 3 个简单步骤进行群组和 1-1 聊天。

在本指南中，我们将通过 3 个简单的步骤创建一个 Ionic 聊天应用程序。

我们将使用 DeadSimpleChat 将聊天功能添加到我们的 Ionic 应用程序中。 我们还将探索如何使用 DeadSimpleChat 功能，例如

  1. 客制化
  2. 语言翻译
  3. 和其他创建一个很棒的离子聊天

首先，让我们构建我们的离子应用程序

这是一个交钥匙聊天，您可以轻松地将其添加到您的网站或应用程序中——无需任何复杂的代码。 对于虚拟/现场活动、SaaS 应用程序、社交平台、教育、游戏、金融免费注册

步骤1。 创建您的 Ionic 应用程序。

打开您的终端并输入以下代码以创建一个新的离子应用程序。

现在使用运行代码

您需要先安装 ionic cli。 如果您没有安装 cli，您可以在此处参考 ionic 文档： https ://ionicframework.com/docs/intro/cli

现在，我们将创建一个空白应用程序，因此在终端中选择空白应用程序，我们将使用 Vue Js 前端技术。 但您也可以使用 Angular 和 React 轻松构建它。

所以，选技术就选黑应用。

现在 cd 进入我命名的应用程序

但你可以随意命名。

现在输入命令

启动应用程序。

启动后，您可以看到空白的起始页。

现在 cd 进入 Ionic 应用程序并打开 index.html 页面

接下来，我们将需要代码来将聊天嵌入到我们的离子应用程序中。 为此，我们需要一个 DeadSimpleChat 帐户。

第 2 步：使用 DeadSimpleChat 创建一个帐户

转到 DeadSimpleChat.com 并单击“开始”按钮以创建一个免费帐户。

创建帐户后，您将进入仪表板页面，点击创建聊天室按钮创建聊天室

创建聊天室后，您可以调整设置、自定义聊天外观以匹配您的应用程序/网站、设置语言和其他参数。

完成设置后，您可以转到嵌入页面并获取嵌入代码

您将需要此嵌入代码才能将聊天添加到您的离子应用程序。

复制嵌入代码，让我们继续我们的离子应用程序。

第 3 步将聊天添加到您的 Ionic 应用程序。

在上一步中，我们复制了 DeadSimpleChat 的嵌入代码

现在，转到您的离子应用程序并打开 HomePage.Vue 文件并添加您从 DeadSimpleChat 复制的脚本标签或嵌入代码

在您希望聊天出现在应用程序中的位置添加代码

代码应该是这个样子：

 <template> <ion-page> <ion-header :translucent="true"> <ion-toolbar> <ion-title>Blank</ion-title> </ion-toolbar> </ion-header> <ion-content :fullscreen="true"> <ion-header collapse="condense"> <ion-toolbar> <ion-title size="large">Blank</ion-title> </ion-toolbar> </ion-header> <div id="container"> <iframe src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe> </div> </ion-content> </ion-page> </template>

你已经在你的离子应用程序中添加了聊天。 看起来像这样

如您所见，我们只需 3 个简单的步骤就可以轻松地在离子应用程序中添加聊天功能。

但是，这仅仅是开始，您可以做更多事情，例如通过 SDK、API 和 Webhooks 控制应用程序。

控制聊天室的外观和感觉，包括字体大小、颜色、文本和大小。

语言翻译和强大的审核功能，包括创建多个审核员、禁止用户、禁止脏话和删除消息的能力。

您可以在此处了解有关开发功能和文档的更多信息：

作为奖励，我将在下面解释一些最常用的 SDK 功能

奖励：JavaScript SDK、API 和 Webhooks

您可以通过 SDK 使用 DeadSimpleChat 的所有功能，例如

  1. 添加用户
  2. 发送信息
  3. 删除消息
  4. 所有可以在聊天中执行的功能也可以使用 SDK 完成
  5. 您还可以通过编程方式将定制发送到每个聊天室。 自定义不同页面和/或不同用户的聊天外观。
  6. 使用具有 webhooks 功能的第三方应用程序。

使用 JavaScript SDK API 和网络钩子，一切都可以完全按照您的需要完成。

以下是如何将 SDK 添加到您的应用程序以及 SDK 中可用的一些常用方法。

如何将 JavaScript SDK 添加到您的 Ionic 应用程序。

要将 SDK 添加到聊天室，您需要导入 SDK。 您需要粘贴脚本标签以将 SDK 导入您的聊天室

<script src="https://cdn.deadsimplechat.com/sdk/1.0/dschatsdk.min.js"></script>

转到您的 Ionic 应用程序并打开索引。 代码将是这样的：

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8" /> <title>Ionic App</title> <base href="/" /> <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark" /> <meta name="viewport" content="viewport-fit=cover, width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" /> <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no" /> <meta name="msapplication-tap-highlight" content="no" /> <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/png" href="<%= BASE_URL %>assets/icon/favicon.png" /> <!-- add to homescreen for ios --> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" /> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Ionic App" /> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black" /> </head> <body> <div id="app"></div> <script src="https://cdn.deadsimplechat.com/sdk/1.0/dschatsdk.min.js"></script> </body> </html>

现在我们已经添加了聊天 SDK，现在让我们将 SDK 连接到 iframe

为此，我们需要三件事

  1. 聊天室编号
  2. 公共 API 密钥

对于 iframe Id 让我给出聊天框的 iframe 和 id

转到HomePage.Vue

并像这样向 iframe 添加一个 id 标签：

 <iframe id="chat-frame" src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>

现在我们已经将 id 标签添加到 iframe

  1. 在这种情况下，我们的聊天室 ID 是：CGOC0byXC

    您还可以在仪表板中看到聊天室 ID -> 聊天室，在那里您可以看到带有聊天室 ID 的聊天室列表

    对于公共 API 密钥，转到仪表板 -> 开发人员 -> 公共 API 密钥

    供您参考，我在下面添加了一张图片：

    现在我们有了将 SDK 连接到聊天室所需的三件事，让我们调用连接函数将 SDK 连接到聊天室。

    打开 HomePage.vue 并输入以下代码。

     <script lang="ts"> import { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } from '@ionic/vue'; import { defineComponent } from 'vue'; let sdk:any = null; let DSChatSDK = window.DSChatSDK; export default defineComponent({ name: 'HomePage', async ionViewDidEnter() { console.log("View Entered"); sdk = new DSChatSDK("CGOC0byXC", "chat-frame", "pub_7172586270477a656a3863587a594f46566e736839307737544b532d3463484c4e524b5743676b7733336d5151767a4b") await sdk.connect(); }, methods: { logout: function() { sdk.logout(); } }, components: { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } }); </script>

    我们已经在上面添加了脚本标签以及 chat-frame 的 id

    我们声明 var SDK 并为其分配值 null。

    我们声明 DSChatSDK 并为其分配 window.DSChatSDK 的值，这是我们添加的用于导入聊天 SDK 的 index.html 中的脚本标记。

    然后在定义组件中，我们添加了离子生命周期方法

    在此方法中，我们正在初始化 DSChatSDK 的新实例并将其分配给 SDK 。

    在下面的方法对象中，我们创建了注销功能，我们正在使用 SDK 的注销方法注销用户。

    来到离子模板。 在这里，我们创建了一个注销按钮，单击该按钮将调用注销方法，该方法又将调用 SDK 的注销方法并将用户从聊天室注销

     <button v-on:click="logout()">Logout</button>

    这就是index.html的样子：

     <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8" /> <title>Ionic App</title> <base href="/" /> <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark" /> <meta name="viewport" content="viewport-fit=cover, width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" /> <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no" /> <meta name="msapplication-tap-highlight" content="no" /> <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/png" href="<%= BASE_URL %>assets/icon/favicon.png" /> <!-- add to homescreen for ios --> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" /> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Ionic App" /> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black" /> </head> <body> <div id="app"></div> <script src="https://cdn.deadsimplechat.com/sdk/1.0/dschatsdk.min.js"></script> </body> </html>

    现在，您已成功添加聊天 SDK 并将 iframe 连接到聊天 SDK。

    接下来，让我们尝试一下聊天SDK的一些常用方法。 您可以在此处了解有关如何将聊天 SDK 添加到您的应用程序以及如何将聊天 SDK 连接到您的应用程序的更多信息： https ://deadsimplechat.com/developer/sdk/quick-start/

    登录用户

    将用户登录到聊天室，我们将使用 joinRoom(Options) 方法。

    如果我们在这里查看 JoinRoom 的文档： https ://deadsimplechat.com/developer/sdk/methods/join

    我们可以看到我们可以使用三个不同的参数加入房间：

    1. 用户名
    2. 访问令牌
    3. 电子邮件

    对于这个演示，我们将使用用户名将用户加入聊天室。

    方法是：

     sdk.joinRoom({ username, roomPassword, accessToken: accessToken, email, password });

    让我们在 HomePage.Vue 中创建另一个名为 JoinRoom 的方法，并使用用户名 John 调用 SDK 加入房间的方法

    因此，我创建了一个名为 joinRoom 的方法，并使用用户名 John 在其中调用了 SDK 的 joinRoom 方法。

    我还创建了一个名为将 John 添加到聊天室的按钮，代码如下所示：

     <template> <ion-page> <ion-header :translucent="true"> <ion-toolbar> <ion-title>Ionic Chat Application</ion-title> </ion-toolbar> </ion-header> <ion-content :fullscreen="true"> <ion-header collapse="condense"> <ion-toolbar> <ion-title size="large">Ionic Chat Application</ion-title> </ion-toolbar> </ion-header> <div id="container"> <iframe id="chat-frame" src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe> </div> <button v-on:click="logout()">Logout</button> <button v-on:click="joinRoom()">Add John to chat room</button> </ion-content> </ion-page> </template> <script lang="ts"> import { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } from '@ionic/vue'; import { defineComponent } from 'vue'; let sdk:any = null; let DSChatSDK = window.DSChatSDK; export default defineComponent({ name: 'HomePage', async ionViewDidEnter() { console.log("View Entered"); sdk = new DSChatSDK("CGOC0byXC", "chat-frame", "pub_7172586270477a656a3863587a594f46566e736839307737544b532d3463484c4e524b5743676b7733336d5151767a4b") await sdk.connect(); }, methods: { logout: function() { sdk.logout(); }, joinRoom: function(){ sdk.joinRoom({ username: "John" }) } }, components: { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } });

    现在，当我们在新选项卡中打开 Ionic 应用程序并单击将 john 添加到聊天室按钮时，用户将加入聊天室并分配用户名 John

    因此我们将用户 john 添加到我们的聊天室。

    您可以在开发者文档中详细了解 DeadSimpleChat 必须提供的 SDK 方法、API 和 Webhooks 的完整列表

    语言翻译

  2. 禁止脏话
  3. 创建版主
  4. 文件共享
  5. 图片分享
  6. 与第三方软件集成
  7. 删除消息
  8. 禁止用户
  9. 自动单点登录

可以在几秒钟内将聊天添加到您的网站或应用程序，并且非常易于使用。

结论

在本文中，我解释了如何通过 3 个简单的步骤使用 Vue Js 轻松地将聊天功能添加到 Ionic 应用程序

如果您有任何问题，可以通过以下方式联系我们：suppor[at]deadsimplechat.com



原文:

This article was originally published on the DeadSimpleChat blog: Ionic Chat App: Group and 1-1 Chat in 3 easy steps.

In this guide we will create an Ionic chat app in 3 easy steps.

We will be using DeadSimpleChat to add chat to our Ionic application. We will also be exploring how we can use DeadSimpleChat features like

  1. Customization
  2. API and SDK and Webhooks
  3. Language translation
  4. and other to create an awesome ionic chat

First, let us scaffold our ionic app

💡New to DeadSimpleChat? It's a turn key chat that you can easily add to your website or App —without any complicated code. For Virtual / Live events, SaaS App, Social Platform, Education, Gaming, Finance Sign Up for Free

Step1. Create your Ionic App.

open your terminal and type the below code to create a new ionic app.

now run the code using

you need to have the ionic cli installed first. If you do not have the cli install you can refer to the ionic documentation here: https://ionicframework.com/docs/intro/cli

now, we will be creating a blank application so in the terminal choose blank application and we will be using the Vue Js front end technology. but you can build this easily using Angular and React as well.

So, choose the technology and choose the black application.

Now cd into the application I have named it

but you can name whatever you like.

Now type the command

to start the application.

Once started you can see the blank starter page.

Now cd into the Ionic app and open the index.html page

Next we will need the code to embed chat on our ionic app. for that we need an account with the DeadSimpleChat.

Step2: Create an account with DeadSimpleChat

Go to DeadSimpleChat.com and click on the Get Started button to create a free account.

Once you have created and account you will land up in the dashboard page there click on the create chat room button to create a chat room

Once you have created a chat room you can adjust the settings, customize the chat look to match your app / website, set language and other parameters.

Once you have made the settings you can go to the embed page and get the embed code

you will need this embed code to add the chat to your ionic app.

Copy the embed code and let us go towards our ionic application.

Step 3 Adding the Chat to your Ionic Application.

In the previous step we copied the embed code for the DeadSimpleChat

Now, go to your ionic application and open the HomePage.Vue file and add the script tag or the embed code that you copied from the DeadSimpleChat

Add the code where you want the chat to appear in your application

the code should look something like this:

<template>
  <ion-page>
    <ion-header :translucent="true">
      <ion-toolbar>
        <ion-title>Blank</ion-title>
      </ion-toolbar>
    </ion-header>

    <ion-content :fullscreen="true">
      <ion-header collapse="condense">
        <ion-toolbar>
          <ion-title size="large">Blank</ion-title>
        </ion-toolbar>
      </ion-header>

      <div id="container">
        <iframe src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
      </div>
    </ion-content>
  </ion-page>
</template>

And you have added the chat in your ionic app. the will look like this

As you can see we have easily added chat in an ionic application in just 3 simple steps.

But, this is just the beginning you can do a lot more like controlling the app via SDK, API and Webhooks.

Controlling the look and feel including the font size, color, text and size of the chat room.

language translation and powerful moderation features including the ability to create multiple moderators, ban users, ban bad words and delete messages.

You can learn more about the development features and documentation here:

https://deadsimplechat.com/developer

As a bonus I will be explaining some of the most used SDK features below

Bonus: JavaScript SDK, API and Webhooks

You can use all the features of DeadSimpleChat with SDK like

  1. Adding users
  2. Sending messages
  3. Deleting message
  4. and all the functions that can be performed in the chat can also be done using the SDK
  5. You can also send customizations programmatically to each chat room. Customize the look of the chat on different pages and / or for different users.
  6. Use third party applications with the webhooks functionality.

Everything can be done exactly as you need with JavaScript SDK API and webhooks.

Here is how you can add SDK to your app and some of the common methods available in the SDK.

How to add JavaScript SDK to your Ionic App.

to add the SDK to the chat room you will need to import the SDK. You need to paste the script tag to import the SDK to your chat room

<script src="https://cdn.deadsimplechat.com/sdk/1.0/dschatsdk.min.js"></script>

Go to your Ionic app and open the index. html page and paste the script tag.

The code will be like this:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <title>Ionic App</title>

    <base href="/" />

    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark" />
    <meta
      name="viewport"
      content="viewport-fit=cover, width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no"
    />
    <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no" />
    <meta name="msapplication-tap-highlight" content="no" />

    <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/png" href="<%= BASE_URL %>assets/icon/favicon.png" />

    <!-- add to homescreen for ios -->
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Ionic App" />
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black" />
  </head>

  <body>
    <div id="app"></div>
    <script src="https://cdn.deadsimplechat.com/sdk/1.0/dschatsdk.min.js"></script>
  </body>

</html>

Now we have added the chat SDK and now let us connect the SDK to the iframe

To do that we will need three things

  1. ID of the iframe
  2. Chat Room ID
  3. Public API key

For the iframe Id let me give the iframe and id of chat-frame

go to HomePage.Vue

and add an id tag to the iframe like this:

<iframe id="chat-frame" src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>

Now we have added the id tag to the iframe

  1. **Chat room ID: **the chat room id is the part of the usl after the deadsimplechat.com/

In this case our chat room id is : CGOC0byXC

You can also see the chat room id in the dashboard -> chat rooms and there you can see a list of chat rooms with their chat room ids

For the public API key go to the Dashboard -> developer -> public API key

For your reference I have added a image below:

Now that we have the three things that are required to connect the SDK to the chat room let us call the connect function to connect the sdk to the chat room.

Open the HomePage.vue and type the below code.

<script lang="ts">
import { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } from '@ionic/vue';
import { defineComponent } from 'vue';

let sdk:any = null;

let DSChatSDK = window.DSChatSDK;

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'HomePage',
  async ionViewDidEnter() {
    console.log("View Entered");
    sdk = new DSChatSDK("CGOC0byXC", "chat-frame", "pub_7172586270477a656a3863587a594f46566e736839307737544b532d3463484c4e524b5743676b7733336d5151767a4b")
    await sdk.connect();
  },
  methods: {
    logout: function() {
      sdk.logout();
    }
  },
  components: {
    IonContent,
    IonHeader,
    IonPage,
    IonTitle,
    IonToolbar
  }
});
</script>

We already have the script tag added above along with the id that is chat-frame

We declare the var SDK and assign it the value null.

we declare DSChatSDK and assign it the value of window.DSChatSDK this is the script tag in the index.html that we added to import the chat SDK.

then in the define component, we have add the the ionic lifecycle method

In this method we are initializing a new instance of DSChatSDK and assigning it to the SDK .

In the methods Object below we have created the logout function and we are using the SDK's logout method to logout the user.

Coming to the ion template. Here we are creating a logout button which when clicked will call the logout method which in turn will call the SDKs logout method and the logout the user from the chat room

 <button v-on:click="logout()">Logout</button>

The final code of the HomePage.Vue looks like this:

<template>
  <ion-page>
    <ion-header :translucent="true">
      <ion-toolbar>
        <ion-title>Ionic Chat Application</ion-title>
      </ion-toolbar>
    </ion-header>

    <ion-content :fullscreen="true">
      <ion-header collapse="condense">
        <ion-toolbar>
          <ion-title size="large">Ionic Chat Application</ion-title>
        </ion-toolbar>
      </ion-header>

      <div id="container">
        <iframe id="chat-frame" src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
      </div>

      <button v-on:click="logout()">Logout</button>
    </ion-content>
  </ion-page>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } from '@ionic/vue';
import { defineComponent } from 'vue';

let sdk:any = null;

let DSChatSDK = window.DSChatSDK;

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'HomePage',
  async ionViewDidEnter() {
    console.log("View Entered");
    sdk = new DSChatSDK("CGOC0byXC", "chat-frame", "pub_7172586270477a656a3863587a594f46566e736839307737544b532d3463484c4e524b5743676b7733336d5151767a4b")
    await sdk.connect();
  },
  methods: {
    logout: function() {
      sdk.logout();
    }
  },
  components: {
    IonContent,
    IonHeader,
    IonPage,
    IonTitle,
    IonToolbar
  }
});


</script>
<style scoped>
#container {
  text-align: center;

  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
}

#container strong {
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 26px;
}

#container p {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 22px;

  color: #8c8c8c;

  margin: 0;
}

#container a {
  text-decoration: none;
}
</style>

and this how the index.html looks like:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <title>Ionic App</title>

    <base href="/" />

    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark" />
    <meta
      name="viewport"
      content="viewport-fit=cover, width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no"
    />
    <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no" />
    <meta name="msapplication-tap-highlight" content="no" />

    <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/png" href="<%= BASE_URL %>assets/icon/favicon.png" />

    <!-- add to homescreen for ios -->
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Ionic App" />
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black" />
  </head>

  <body>
    <div id="app"></div>
    <script src="https://cdn.deadsimplechat.com/sdk/1.0/dschatsdk.min.js"></script>
  </body>

</html>

Now, you have successfully added the chat SDK and connected the iframe to the chat SDK.

Next, let us try some of the common methods of the chat SDK. you can learn more about how to add the chat SDK to your app and how to connect the chat SDK to your app here: https://deadsimplechat.com/developer/sdk/quick-start/

Login user

to login the user to the chat room we will be using the joinRoom(Options) method.

If we look at the documentation here for JoinRoom: https://deadsimplechat.com/developer/sdk/methods/join

We can see that we can join room using three different parameters:

  1. username
  2. accessToken
  3. email

For this demo we will be using the username to join the user to the chat room.

the method is :

sdk.joinRoom({
    username,
    roomPassword,
    accessToken: accessToken,
    email,
    password
});

Let us create another method called the JoinRoom in our HomePage.Vue and call the SDKs join room method with the username John

so, I have created a method called joinRoom and called the SDKs joinRoom method inside it with the username John.

I have also created a button called Add John to chat room the code looks like:

<template>
  <ion-page>
    <ion-header :translucent="true">
      <ion-toolbar>
        <ion-title>Ionic Chat Application</ion-title>
      </ion-toolbar>
    </ion-header>

    <ion-content :fullscreen="true">
      <ion-header collapse="condense">
        <ion-toolbar>
          <ion-title size="large">Ionic Chat Application</ion-title>
        </ion-toolbar>
      </ion-header>

      <div id="container">
        <iframe id="chat-frame" src="https://deadsimplechat.com/CGOC0byXC" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
      </div>

      <button v-on:click="logout()">Logout</button>
      <button v-on:click="joinRoom()">Add John to chat room</button>
    </ion-content>
  </ion-page>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { IonContent, IonHeader, IonPage, IonTitle, IonToolbar } from '@ionic/vue';
import { defineComponent } from 'vue';

let sdk:any = null;

let DSChatSDK = window.DSChatSDK;

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'HomePage',
  async ionViewDidEnter() {
    console.log("View Entered");
    sdk = new DSChatSDK("CGOC0byXC", "chat-frame", "pub_7172586270477a656a3863587a594f46566e736839307737544b532d3463484c4e524b5743676b7733336d5151767a4b")
    await sdk.connect();
  },
  methods: {
    logout: function() {
      sdk.logout();
    },
    joinRoom: function(){
      sdk.joinRoom({
        username: "John"
      })
    }

  },
  components: {
    IonContent,
    IonHeader,
    IonPage,
    IonTitle,
    IonToolbar
  }
});

Now, When we open the Ionic app in a new tab and click on the Add john to the chat room button a user is joined in the chat room and assigned the username John

thus we have added the user john to our chat room.

You can learn more about the complete list of SDK methods, API and Webhooks that DeadSimpleChat has to offer in the developer documentation

There are many more features and functions that can be used with the SDK like

  1. Language translation
  2. Banning Bad words
  3. Creating Moderators
  4. File Sharing
  5. Image Sharing
  6. Integrating with third party software
  7. delete messages
  8. Banning users
  9. Automatic Single Sign On

DeadSimpleChat can handle Millions of concurrent chat participants and is the most scalable chat software.

DeadSimpleChat is also your turn key chat solution. Adding chat to your website or app can be done in seconds and is very easy to use.

Conclusion

In this article I have explained how you can easily add chat to your Ionic Application with Vue Js in 3 easy steps

If you have any questions you can contact us at: suppor[at]deadsimplechat.com

Items.Title: 关于 Typescript 中的枚举 | All about Enum in Typescript
Items.Description:
枚举用于定义 Typescript 中的命名常量。 这是打字稿自己的功能，它不是 javascript 的类型级别扩展。 它是使用enum关键字定义的。

即，

  1. 数字枚举
  2. 字符串枚举
  3. 异构枚举

数字枚举。

 enum Numeric { First , Second , Third , Fourth } console . log ( Numeric . Second ); // 1
  1. 数字枚举的第一个成员未初始化，然后它从 0 开始， Second变为 1。
 enum Numeric { First = 1 , Second , Third , Fourth } console . log ( Numeric . Second ); // 2
  1. 数字枚举现在初始化为 1，因此从 1 开始， Second变为 2。

字符串枚举

用字符串文字初始化的枚举称为字符串枚举。

 enum StringEnum { A = " a " , B = " b " , C = " c " , D = " d " , }

异构枚举

数字和字符串枚举的混合。

 enum HeterogeneousEnum { No = 0 , Yes = ' YES ' }
  1. 枚举中不允许​​重复标识符。

使用枚举

一世。 访问任何成员作为枚举本身的属性。

 console . log ( Numeric . Second ); // 1

二. 使用枚举的名称声明类型。

 ( function myFunc ( word , number : Numeric ) { console . log ( word + ' ' + direction ); })( ' word ' , Numeric . Second ); // word 1
  1. 没有初始化器的枚举需要放在第一位。
 function getConstantValue () { return 1 ; } enum Numeric { first , second = getConstantValue (), } // first & second shouldn't be upside down.
  1. 没有初始化器的枚举应该在使用数字常量或其他枚举常量初始化的枚举之后。如下所示：
 enum Numeric { first = 2 , second = A , third }

但不像下面这样。

 enum Numeric { first = 2 , second = getConstantValue (), third }
  1. 每个枚举成员都有一个与之关联的值，该值可以是常量或计算值。
 enum constNComputeEnum { first = 1 , second = first , // reference to previously defined constant enum member. third = ( 1 + 2 ), // parenthesized constant enum expression, fourth = + true , // Unary operator applied. fifth = 1 & 2 // binary operator applied. }

  1. 在所有其他情况下，枚举成员被视为已计算。

  2. 具有字符串值成员的枚举中不允许​​计算值。 如下所示： 

 enum constNComputeEnum { first = 1 , second = ' second ' , third = constNComputeEnum . first , // not allowed }
  1. 将常量枚举表达式计算为 NaN 或 Infinity 是编译时错误。

Ideally, below is not accepted but somehow not throwing any error. 我检查了最新的打字稿，没有抛出任何错误。

 enum NaNNInfinity { first = 0 / 0 , // Result in NaN second = 1 / 0 , // Result in Infinity }

反向映射

数字枚举成员可以获得从枚举值到枚举名称的反向映射。

 enum reverseMappingEnum { first } const firstItem = reverseMappingEnum . first ; console . log ( reverseMappingEnum [ firstItem ]); // first

常量枚举。

为了避免生成额外的 js 代码，我们可以将任何枚举声明为 const。 这些在编译后被完全删除，并且不能有计算成员。 建议根本不要使用 const 枚举。

 const enum constEnum { first }

上面编译查看对应的js文件，什么也没有。

环境枚举

常规枚举：如果其前面的枚举成员被视为 const，则没有初始化程序的成员将被视为 const。
环境枚举：没有初始值设定项的成员将被视为已计算。

 enum AmbientEnum { first = 1 , second , third = 2 , }

对象与枚举

文字枚举

文字枚举成员是没有初始化值或具有初始化为的值的常量枚举成员

  • 任何字符串文字（例如“第一”，“第二”）
  • 任何数字文字（例如 1 到 100）
  • 应用于任何数字文字的一元减号（例如 -2、-4）

枚举成员也成为类型！

 enum Numeric { thirty , forty , } interface Person { age : Numeric . thirty ; id : number } let c : thirty = { age : Numeric . forty , id : 100 , };

将编译错误显示为： Type 'Numeric.forty' is not assignable to type 'Numeric.thirty'.

枚举类型本身有效地成为每个枚举成员的联合。

 enum Numeric { first , second , } function myFunc ( type : Numeric ) { if ( type !== Numeric . first || type !== Numeric . second ) { } }

将编译错误显示为： This condition will always return 'true' since the types 'Numeric.first' and 'Numeric.second' have no overlap.

柯克·希林福德—— 一旦暂停，urstrulyvishwak 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，urstrulyvishwak 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，urstrulyvishwak 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 urstrulyvishwak 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 urstrulyvishwak：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 urstrulyvishwak 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Enums are used to define named constants in Typescript. It's the typescripts own feature which is not a type level extension of javascript. It is defined using enum keyword.

Typescript has three types of enums:

Namely,

  1. Numeric Enums
  2. String Enums
  3. Heterogeneous Enums

Numeric Enums. 

enum Numeric { First, Second, Third, Fourth
}
console.log(Numeric.Second); // 1
  1. A numeric enum's first member is not initialized then it starts from 0 and Second becomes 1. 
enum Numeric { First = 1, Second, Third, Fourth
}
console.log(Numeric.Second); // 2
  1. Numeric enum is now initialized with 1 hence starts from 1 and Second becomes 2.

String Enums

An enum which is initialized with string literal is called String enum.

enum StringEnum { A = "a", B = "b", C = "c", D = "d",
}

Heterogeneous enums

Mix of numeric and string enums.

enum HeterogeneousEnum { No = 0, Yes = 'YES'
}
  1. Duplicate Identifier is not allowed in Enum.

Using an enum

i. Access any member as the property of enum itself.

console.log(Numeric.Second); // 1

ii. Declare types using the name of the enum.

(function myFunc(word, number: Numeric) { console.log(word + ' ' + direction);
})('word', Numeric.Second);
// word 1
  1. Enum without initializers need to be first. 
function getConstantValue() { return 1;
} enum Numeric { first, second = getConstantValue(),
}
// first & second shouldn't be upside down.
  1. Enums without initializers should come after initialized enums with numeric constants or other enum constants.like below: 
enum Numeric { first = 2, second = A, third
}

But not like below.

enum Numeric { first = 2, second = getConstantValue(), third }
  1. Each enum member has a value associated with it which can be either constant or computed. 
enum constNComputeEnum { first = 1, second = first, // reference to previously defined constant enum member. third = (1 + 2), // parenthesized constant enum expression, fourth = +true, // Unary operator applied. fifth = 1 & 2 // binary operator applied.
}

  1. In All other cases enum member considered computed.

  2. Computed values are not permitted in an enum with string valued members. like below:

enum constNComputeEnum { first = 1, second = 'second', third = constNComputeEnum.first, // not allowed }
  1. It is a compile time error for constant enum expressions to be evaluated to NaN or Infinity.

Ideally, below is not accepted but somehow not throwing any error. I checked with latest typescript and is not throwing any error.

enum NaNNInfinity { first = 0 / 0, // Result in NaN second = 1 / 0, // Result in Infinity
}

Reverse Mapping

Numeric enum members can get a reverse mapping from enum values to enum names.

enum reverseMappingEnum { first
} const firstItem = reverseMappingEnum.first;
console.log(reverseMappingEnum[firstItem]); // first

const enums.

To avoid generating extra js code we can declare any enum as const. These are completely removed after compilation and can't have computed members. It is recommended to not use const enums at all.

const enum constEnum { first
}

Compile above and check its corresponding js file and you find nothing.

Ambient Enums

Regular Enums: Member that doesn't have initializer will be considered const if its preceding enum member considered const.
Ambient Enums: Member that doesn't have initializer will be considered as computed.

enum AmbientEnum { first = 1, second, third = 2,
}

Object vs Enums

Typescript Enum exactly equal to object with as const.

const enum Numeric { first, second, third, fourth, } const Numeric = { first: 0, second: 1, third: 2, fourth: 3, } as const;

Literal Enum

A literal enum member is a constant enum member with no initialized value, or with values that are initialized to

  • any string literal (e.g. "first", "second")
  • any numeric literal (e.g. 1 to 100)
  • a unary minus applied to any numeric literal (e.g. -2, -4)

Enum members also become types as well!

enum Numeric { thirty, forty, } interface Person { age: Numeric.thirty; id: number } let c: thirty = { age: Numeric.forty, id: 100, };

Shows compilation error as: Type 'Numeric.forty' is not assignable to type 'Numeric.thirty'.

Enum types themselves effectively become a union of each enum member.

 enum Numeric { first, second, } function myFunc(type: Numeric) { if (type !== Numeric.first || type !== Numeric.second) { } }

Shows compilation error as: This condition will always return 'true' since the types 'Numeric.first' and 'Numeric.second' have no overlap.

Kirk Shillingford - Nov 10

Once unpublished, all posts by urstrulyvishwak will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If urstrulyvishwak is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Report other inappropriate conduct
